title: ajugoides humilis
intro: Ajugoides humilis, also known as Ajuga reptans 'Burgundy', is a type of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae), characterized by its purple foliage and blue or purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Ajugoides humilis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, making it a popular choice in herbalism.
